name: I'm on a box
hints: You are standing on a box. You can look inside it or get down.
GET OFF, GET DOWN, or JUMP to get off the box. LOOK DOWN or LOOK BOX to see inside.
Use GET OFF to step down from the box. You may need to be on the box to reach something high up.
notes: Standing on top of a box/crate. GET OFF, GET DOWN, or JUMP to step down. Being on the box may help reach items on high shelves or ledges.
